title: Ornamental
description: Adds decorative armor sets to the game
body:
This mod add 20+ new, fully cosmetic, armor sets to the game. These sets have no durability or armor, & are just for making you look good.

![A variety of cosmetic armor sets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6beffbd2fc6a21216ee159d11148ef5e0ac1646.png)
